bullets: • Data analytics roles are expected to grow faster than average occupations in the next decade.
• The job market is highly competitive, favoring candidates who can create business impact.
• Basic skills like SQL, Excel, and Power BI are now baseline requirements, not differentiators.
• Success requires business understanding, strong communication, and problem-solving skills.
• Pursuing a master's degree is not a guarantee of success; depth of knowledge is crucial.
raw:
• Data analytics roles are expected to grow faster than average occupations in the next decade.
• The job market is highly competitive, favoring candidates who can create business impact.
• Basic skills like SQL, Excel, and Power BI are now baseline requirements, not differentiators.
• Success requires business understanding, strong communication, and problem-solving skills.
• Pursuing a master's degree is not a guarantee of success; depth of knowledge is crucial.
